name_en: Genuine leather small size in stock!!️
name_cn:
Genuine leather small size in stock!!️
Latest color Linglang buckle, new D-joy returns with a bang, latest small size ✔️, a major hit 🔥. Bag comes with two shoulder straps, multiple carrying methods 🙋🏻‍♀️. Stylish and chic. Classic quilted design 🥅, paired with soft sheepskin for elegance and fashion 🌿
size:22.5*6*11.5cm
